tracks.meaning: to cease work or activity and relax or recuperate
a period of relaxation or inactivity between periods of work or activity
the remaining part of something after the main or greater part has been removed or used
a concluding section or coda of a musical composition
something that supports or props up another object
the remainder of an estate or property that passes to a beneficiary after prior interests terminate
used as an interjection to express agreement, acceptance, or dismissal of a topic
mental or emotional peace and freedom from stress or anxiety
to lean or be positioned at an angle against something
the part of a data structure or program that remains after processing or removal of elements
